name: Marshmallow Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. On a lightly floured surface, roll pastry to a 12-inch circle.
2. Place in a 9-inch pie plate, turn under edge; flute.
3. Drizzle apples with lemon juice. Toss with combined sugar, flour, and cinnamon.
4. Spoon into shell.
5. Bake at 450 degrees for 35 minutes.
6. Reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees.
7. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
8. Gradually add marshmallow cream, beating until stiff peaks form.
9. Spread over apples, sealing to edge.
10. Bake 10 minutes or until meringue is slightly browned.
11. Cool and serve.
